ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Home team */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Away team */,
  "game_result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., win, loss, tie) */,
  "game_location" TEXT /* Location where the game was played */,
  "game_attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators attending the game */,
  "game_weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "game_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the game */,
  "game_referee" TEXT /* Name of the main referee */,
  "game_version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team FOREIGN KEY ("away_team") REFERENCES teams ("team_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team FOREIGN KEY ("home_team") REFERENCES teams ("team_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "team_city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "team_foundation_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_coach" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "team_arena" TEXT /* Name of the home arena */,
  "team_arena_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home arena */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quarterbacks" (
  "qb_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quarterback */,
  "qb_name" TEXT /* Full name of the quarterback */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the quarterback belongs to */,
  "qb_position" TEXT /* Position of the quarterback (e.g., starting QB, backup QB) */,
  "qb_height" TEXT /* Height of the quarterback */,
  "qb_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the quarterback */,
  "qb_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the quarterback */,
  "qb_draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the quarterback was drafted */,
  "qb_draft_round" INTEGER /* Draft round */,
  "qb_draft_pick" INTEGER /* Draft pick number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qb_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quarterbacks_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plays" (
  "play_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the play belongs to */,
  "quarterback_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quarterback who made the play */,
  "down" INTEGER /* Down the play occurred on */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Distance to gain for a first down */,
  "yards_gained" INTEGER /* Yards gained during the play */,
  "play_result" TEXT /* Result of the play (e.g., completion, incompletion, touchdown) */,
  "play_time" TEXT /* Time of the play within the game */,
  "play_quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter in which the play occurred */,
  "play_type" TEXT /* Type of play (e.g., pass, run) */,
  "play_target" TEXT /* Name of the player targeted in the play */,
  "play_yardline" TEXT /* Yardline where the play started */,
  "play_version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plays_distance FOREIGN KEY ("distance") REFERENCES distances ("distance_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plays_play_yardline FOREIGN KEY ("play_yardline") REFERENCES yards ("yard_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plays_play_target FOREIGN KEY ("play_target") REFERENCES targets ("target_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plays_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plays_quarterback_id FOREIGN KEY ("quarterback_id") REFERENCES quarterbacks ("qb_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plays_play_type FOREIGN KEY ("play_type") REFERENCES play_types ("play_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plays_play_result FOREIGN KEY ("play_result") REFERENCES results ("result_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plays_down FOREIGN KEY ("down") REFERENCES downs ("down_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "quarters" (
  "quarter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quarter */,
  "quarter_name" TEXT /* Name of the quarter (e.g., 1st Quarter, 2nd Quarter) */,
  "quarter_number" INTEGER /* Number of the quarter (e.g., 1, 2, 3, 4) */,
  "quarter_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the quarter */,
  "quarter_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the quarter */,
  "quarter_score_home" INTEGER /* Score of the home team at the end of the quarter */,
  "quarter_score_away" INTEGER /* Score of the away team at the end of the quarter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quarter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "downs" (
  "down_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each down */,
  "down_name" TEXT /* Name of the down (e.g., 1st Down, 2nd Down) */,
  "down_number" INTEGER /* Number of the down (e.g., 1, 2, 3, 4) */,
  "down_description" TEXT /* Description of the down (e.g., '1st down, short yardage') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("down_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distances" (
  "distance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distance */,
  "distance_name" TEXT /* Name of the distance (e.g., 1st & 10, 2nd & 5) */,
  "distance_value" INTEGER /* Value of the distance (e.g., 10, 5) */,
  "distance_description" TEXT /* Description of the distance (e.g., '1st & 10, long yardage') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "yards" (
  "yard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each yardline */,
  "yard_name" TEXT /* Name of the yardline (e.g., 1st & 10 on the ECU39) */,
  "yard_value" INTEGER /* Value of the yardline (e.g., 39) */,
  "yard_description" TEXT /* Description of the yardline (e.g., '1st & 10 on the 39-yard line') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("yard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play result */,
  "result_name" TEXT /* Name of the play result (e.g., completion, incompletion, touchdown) */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the result (e.g., 'Completion to the 35-yard line') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "play_types" (
  "play_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play type */,
  "play_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the play type (e.g., pass, run) */,
  "play_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the play type (e.g., 'Short pass to the left side') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target */,
  "target_name" TEXT /* Name of the target (e.g., L. Shannon, S. Richards) */,
  "target_position" TEXT /* Position of the target player */,
  "target_height" TEXT /* Height of the target player */,
  "target_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the target player */,
  "target_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the target player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication (hashed) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "user_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_user_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "play_id" INTEGER /* ID of the play being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the play */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the play was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_browser" TEXT /* Browser used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_play_id FOREIGN KEY ("play_id") REFERENCES plays ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "play_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play statistic */,
  "play_id" INTEGER /* ID of the play the statistic belongs to */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic (e.g., yards gained, completions) */,
  "stat_value" INTEGER /* Value of the statistic */,
  "stat_description" TEXT /* Description of the statistic */,
  "stat_version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_stats_play_id FOREIGN KEY ("play_id") REFERENCES plays ("play_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "game_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic (e.g., total yards, total points) */,
  "stat_value" INTEGER /* Value of the statistic */,
  "stat_description" TEXT /* Description of the statistic */,
  "stat_version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
